message:
perf(sql): add hash join to worker executor - 18x faster JOINs

- Implement hash join for equality conditions in worker SQL executor
- Optimize _parseJsonColumnar with pre-allocated arrays
- Add fast path for buffer-only reads (no OPFS)
- Single-pass column projection and __rowId removal

Before: JOIN 18.5ms (26x slower than DuckDB)
After:  JOIN 1.0ms (1.67x slower than DuckDB)

All 223 browser tests passing.
